title: Bitdeer July 2025 Production and Operations Update
text: Bitdeer announced July 2025 production and operations metrics showing significant progress toward the company's 40 EH/s self-mining capacity target. The company demonstrated strong execution across multiple growth initiatives including SEALMINER hardware development, global infrastructure expansion, and AI Cloud service deployment. July 2025 marked a pivot point where Bitdeer's operations increasingly balanced Bitcoin mining with AI Cloud services. The company energized additional power capacity at Tydal, Norway and other international facilities. SEALMINER A4 development continued on schedule toward Q4 2025 tape-out. GPU deployment for AI Cloud services expanded, signaling acceleration in the company's AI infrastructure revenue trajectory. The July 2025 update reflected Bitdeer's successful navigation of the business expansion toward integrated mining and AI service provision. Capital deployment across multiple projects showed discipline while maintaining growth momentum.
